user.title: T-Meter Oil Tank (Local)
user.description: Home Assistant will listen for your oil-tank sensor's local reports. Add a DNS rewrite (in AdGuard/Pi-hole/your router) pointing the sensor's cloud hostname to this Home Assistant host, then the device reports here instead of the cloud.

data.forward_cloud: Also forward to the vendor cloud (keeps the phone app working)
data.enable_app_passthrough: Relay port 443 to the vendor cloud (lets the phone app work)

data_description.port: The TCP port the sensor connects to. Leave at the default unless you know it differs.
data_description.tank_gallons: Rated capacity, used as the 100% reference for the fill percentage. A common residential tank is 275 gallons.
data_description.kwh_per_gallon: No. 2 heating oil is about 40.6 kWh per US gallon. Used for the Energy Dashboard sensor.
data_description.forward_cloud: Relays each report to the original cloud so the vendor app keeps updating. Leave off to be fully cloud-free.
data_description.orientation: Vertical (upright) or horizontal (on its side). Determines how the oil height converts to volume.
data_description.tank_height_inches: The top-to-bottom distance the sensor measures: tank height for a vertical tank (e.g. 44), or diameter for a horizontal one (e.g. 27).
data_description.enable_app_passthrough: Transparently forwards HTTPS (443) to the vendor cloud so the phone app keeps working while DNS points the sensor's hostname here. Requires port 443 to be free on this host.
data_description.host: Interface to bind. 0.0.0.0 listens on all interfaces.

error.port_in_use: That port is already in use on this host. Choose a different port or free the one in use.

abort.single_instance_allowed: T-Meter Oil Tank is already configured. One listener serves all of your tanks.

data.forward_cloud: Also forward to the vendor cloud
data.gallons_per_inch: Gallons per inch (vertical; 0 = auto from height)
data.enable_app_passthrough: Relay port 443 to the vendor cloud

data_description.offline_after_minutes: If no report arrives within this many minutes, the connectivity sensor turns off. Set to 0 to keep the device 'connected' once seen (useful because the sensor deep-sleeps between reports).
data_description.refill_threshold_gallons: A level rise of at least this many gallons between reports is treated as a delivery and fires a refill event you can automate on.
data_description.tank_height_inches: Tank height for vertical, or diameter for horizontal (inches).
data_description.gallons_per_inch: Vertical calibration: gallons per inch of oil height. Compute as (app gallons / oil-height inches) from the device's detail screen, or set 0 to derive it from capacity and height.
data_description.raw_divisor: Converts the raw ullage reading to inches (inches = raw / divisor). Default 254 (the reading is tenths of a millimetre).
